claim.statement: All functionality must be operable through a keyboard interface without requiring specific timings for individual keystrokes (WCAG 2.2 SC 2.1.1 Keyboard, Level A). Custom controls (menus, comboboxes, drag interactions) need keyboard equivalents and must not create keyboard traps.

limitations: Drag-and-drop and pointer-path gestures require deliberately designed keyboard alternatives

do: Use native interactive elements (button, a, input, select) wherever possible
Implement ARIA authoring-practice keyboard patterns for custom widgets
Provide keyboard alternatives for drag, swipe, and pointer-only actions
avoid: Click-only handlers on non-focusable div/span elements
Modals or widgets that trap keyboard focus with no escape
